execution_summary: Built and ran a Python 3.10-slim Docker environment with numpy, pandas, scipy, statsmodels, and patsy. After initial container run error (missing 'replication-exec' image), rebuilt with the correct tag and launched successfully. First execution failed due to a MixedLM index misalignment; the script was revised to drop missing values and reset indices before modeling. A transient syntax error from an edit was fixed by overwriting the script with a clean version. Final execution completed, producing MixedLM RT and GEE accuracy results saved to /app/data. The focal preregistered hypothesis (positive NFC × trial × rewardlevel effect on standardized log RT) was not supported; the effect was positive but non-significant. Accuracy models (exploratory GEE approximation) showed a significant negative NFC three-way and a significant positive Stroop three-way.

code_executed.logs: Traceback (MixedLM index error): IndexError: index 33520 is out of bounds for axis 0 with size 33520. After patching to drop NAs/reset index, a SyntaxError occurred due to duplicated function headers.
code_executed.environment: Docker image: python:3.10-slim with numpy>=1.23.0, pandas>=1.5.0, scipy>=1.9.0, statsmodels>=0.14.0, patsy>=0.5.3

code_executed.logs: Completed with warnings: Random effects covariance singular; MLE may be on the boundary; Hessian not positive definite. Script printed JSON results and wrote summaries to /app/data. Key outputs: NFC RT three-way estimate=0.0065, p=0.182; Stroop RT three-way estimate=-0.00069, p=0.888; NFC accuracy three-way (GEE) estimate=-0.0725, p=0.00085; Stroop accuracy three-way (GEE) estimate=0.0302, p=0.00565.
code_executed.environment: Python 3.10 with numpy 1.23+, pandas 1.5+, scipy 1.9+, statsmodels 0.14+, patsy 0.5.3

results.hypothesis_tested: In a task-switching paradigm with within-subject reward manipulation, the three-way interaction NFC × trial (switch=1 vs repeat=-1) × rewardlevel (-1 low, 1 high) will be positive when predicting standardized log reaction times on correct trials, controlling for block and subject random intercepts.

findings_summary.outcome_name: NFC × trial × rewardlevel on standardized log RT (MixedLM)
Stroopindex × trial × rewardlevel on standardized log RT (MixedLM)
NFC × trial × rewardlevel on accuracy (GEE, binomial, exchangeable by SubjectID)
Stroopindex × trial × rewardlevel on accuracy (GEE, binomial, exchangeable by SubjectID)

tables.table_description: Full statsmodels summaries for MixedLM RT models and GEE accuracy models, including fixed effects, SEs, z-stats, and covariance information.
JSON with key three-way interaction estimates, SEs, CIs, and p-values.
